message: Enhance scraping functionality in index.ts by adding support for new CLI options including output directory, debug mode, and wait-for-selector. Introduce improved error handling with detailed hints for missing messages and refine HTML escaping for better output safety. Update argument parsing logic to accommodate new options and enhance retry logic in the scrape function for better resilience against network issues.
